allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const path = require\('path'\); const os = require\('os'\); const doc = path.join\(os.homedir\(\), 'Documents', '英语一号'\); console.log\('Doc dir:', doc\); console.log\('Exists:', fs.existsSync\(doc\)\); if\(fs.existsSync\(doc\)\){ console.log\('Contents:', fs.readdirSync\(doc\)\); const diary = path.join\(doc, 'diary'\); console.log\('diary exists:', fs.existsSync\(diary\)\); const writing = path.join\(doc, 'writing'\); console.log\('writing exists:', fs.existsSync\(writing\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const os=require\('os'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); const home=os.homedir\(\); console.log\('Home:', home\); const doc = home + '\\\\\\\\Documents'; console.log\('Documents exists:', fs.existsSync\(doc\)\); if\(fs.existsSync\(doc\)\){ console.log\('Doc contents:', fs.readdirSync\(doc\).slice\(0,10\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const os=require\('os'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); const home=os.homedir\(\); console.log\('Home contents:', fs.readdirSync\(home\).filter\(d => d.includes\('Doc'\) || d.includes\('doc'\) || d.includes\('One'\) || d.includes\('文'\)\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const path=require\('path'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); const os=require\('os'\); const home=os.homedir\(\); const items=fs.readdirSync\(home\); const docs=items.find\(d=>d==='Documents'\); console.log\('Found Documents folder:', docs\); const full=path.join\(home, docs\); console.log\('Full path:', full\); console.log\('isDirectory:', fs.statSync\(full\).isDirectory\(\)\); console.log\('Contents:', fs.readdirSync\(full\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const path=require\('path'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); const doc=path.join\(process.env.USERPROFILE || 'C:/Users/Administrator', 'Documents', '英语一号'\); console.log\('Path:', doc\); console.log\('Exists:', fs.existsSync\(doc\)\); if\(fs.existsSync\(doc\)\){ console.log\('Contents:', fs.readdirSync\(doc\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const path=require\('path'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); const doc=path.join\(process.env.USERPROFILE || 'C:/Users/Administrator', 'Documents', '英语一号'\); console.log\('Path:', doc\); console.log\('Exists:', fs.existsSync\(doc\)\); if\(fs.existsSync\(doc\)\){ console.log\('Contents:', fs.readdirSync\(doc\)\); ['diary','writing'].forEach\(d => { const p=path.join\(doc,d\); console.log\(d+' exists:', fs.existsSync\(p\)\); }\); }")

Bash(node -e "const {execSync}=require\('child_process'\); try{const out=execSync\('netstat -ano | findstr :5173',{encoding:'utf8',windowsHide:true}\); console.log\('Port 5173 processes:', out\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('Port 5173 is free'\);}")

Bash(node -e "const path=require\('path'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); const doc='D:/Users/Administrator/Documents/英语一号'; console.log\('Exists:', fs.existsSync\(doc\)\); if\(fs.existsSync\(doc\)\){ console.log\('Contents:', fs.readdirSync\(doc\)\); ['diary','writing'].forEach\(d => { console.log\(d+':', fs.existsSync\(path.join\(doc,d\)\)\); }\); }")
